name: Gateway Pickleball Association
description: There are 2 outdoor courts and 6 indoor courts taped off in an auxiliary gym at the Cache intermediate gym that are open on specified days. GroupMe link Pickleball Lawton/Cache.

name: George Lee park
description: Come play pickleball at George Lee park in United States, OK! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Tannehill School
description: Come play pickleball at Tannehill School in United States, OK! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.
